memberdef.name: storage_data

briefdescription.para: This function is Bulk Out Endpoint handler/Callback called by driver when data is received.

parameterdescription.para: is number of bytes requested for reception.
is actual number of bytes received from Host.

briefdescription.para: This function is Bulk In Endpoint handler/Callback called by driver when data is sent.

parameterdescription.para: is number of bytes requested to send.
is actual number of bytes sent to Host.

briefdescription.para: This function setups the interrupt system such that interrupts can occur.

detaileddescription.para: This function is application specific since the actual system may or may not have an interrupt controller. The USB controller could be directly connected to a processor without an interrupt controller. The user should modify this function to fit the application.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsbPsu instance.
is the interrupt ID of the USB controller

briefdescription.para: This function is implementing USB mass storage example.

parameterdescription.para: USB instance pointer. DeviceId USB Device ID UsbIntrId USB Interrupt ID

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS if successful,
XST_FAILURE if unsuccessful.

briefdescription.para: This task implements mass storage functionality.
This function is the main function of the USB mass storage example.
